{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Frozen Blade
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of the Frozen Blade]] is a path used by Truegolds in the [[Frozen Blade]] School.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
